title: Negotiate remote pay from low-cost lands
meta_description: Turn public rate data into a 2.0x salary bump — Puppeteer 22.6 scrapers, 2026 benchmarks, and negotiation scripts for lower-cost countries
prewritten_tweet:

This free scraper pulls US contractor rates from Toptal, Comet, and AngelList.
